ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the course is offered */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours the course is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses_instructors" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grading_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grading criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the grading criterion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grading criterion */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum possible score for the criterion */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_grading_criteria" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criterion */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the grading criterion in the course */,
  "criterion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the criterion for the specific course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Current year of study */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id", "student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criterion */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the student for the criterion */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who conducted the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES grading_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment for the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who wrote the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_comments_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_comments_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the evaluation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who made the historical evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_history_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grading criterion */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the criterion for the course */,
  "min_score" REAL /* Minimum score of the criterion for the course */,
  "max_score" REAL /* Maximum score of the criterion for the course */,
  "median_score" REAL /* Median score of the criterion for the course */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of scores for the criterion in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES grading_criteria ("criterion_id")
)
